name: Jay Mercer
title: Space Cowboys, Inc. (founder, sole employee until further notice)

missions.name: Quick Run — Pays Dirt
missions.briefing: Hey, you got Jay. Rock out near the belt, tagged for samples. Grab what it has and bring it back. Close to home, not much drama. Good for the ledger, good for the coffee fund. — Jay

missions.name: Belt Loop — Pick Something That Pays
missions.briefing: Hey, you got Jay. Science people want a heavy extraction. The rock is further out, the payout is better, and the hold is going to come back full if you fly it right. Open the bay with F when you are on the surface, fill it, and do not leave early. — Jay

missions.name: Surface Read — Science Wants Numbers
missions.briefing: Hey, you got Jay. Science division needs gravitometric readings off the surface. Land near the beacon, calibrate the probes as they drop, and bring back the data. Quick job if you fly clean. Habitat is H if you need a minute before the burn back. — Jay

missions.name: Rock Read — Science Wants Receipts
missions.briefing: Hey, you got Jay. Science division wants a composition report before they pay haul rates. Land, wake the terminal, tag a few rocks with SCIENCE, then bring back a sample from whatever the report likes best. Paperwork with a drill bit. Could be worse. — Jay

missions.name: Jupiter Side — Higher Cuts Out Here
missions.briefing: Hey, you got Jay. We are running on Jupiter now too. Belt cycle queued up if you are up for it — higher margins than the Earth runs, which honestly was not hard to beat. Hit the Space Cowboys board, grab the job. — Jay

missions.name: Jupiter Listing — Rates Jumped
missions.briefing: Hey, you got Jay. Picked up a Jupiter listing this week, asteroid-side. Standard gather but the rates are up. No notes on why. I have learned not to ask when the number is good. — Jay

missions.name: Jupiter Survey — New Territory, Same Approach
missions.briefing: Hey, you got Jay. Jupiter board is open now. Survey work this time — your kind of run. New territory but the slingshot windows out here are honest once you learn to read them. Habitat is H if you need a rest between burns. — Jay
